sprint.name: Query Execution Optimization
sprint.goal: Minimize unnecessary computation through smart query analysis and early termination

tasks.name: Enhanced Query Complexity Estimator
tasks.description: Add adaptive depth calculation using formula k_dyn = k_base × (1 + δ × C_q) and layer recommendations
acceptanceCriteria: Layer recommendations based on query type

tasks.name: Early Termination Manager
tasks.description: Implement early termination when search results are adequate, executing layers in cost-order
acceptanceCriteria: Early termination when results are adequate
~60% early termination rate on typical queries

tasks.name: Reflection Loop Optimization
tasks.description: Add progressive limit increase and focused query refinement based on missing information
acceptanceCriteria: Focused query refinement based on gaps

tasks.name: Query Plan Caching
tasks.description: Cache query analysis and planning results with LRU eviction and query normalization
acceptanceCriteria: Query plan caching with LRU eviction
Query normalization for better cache hits

tasks.name: Query Execution Benchmarks
tasks.description: Create benchmark suite for early termination, reflection loop, and query caching
